metadata.description: Custom skills for Claude Code: product requirements discovery and iterative improvement loops

plugins.name: product-requirements
plugins.description: Product requirements discovery and PRD generation through structured interviews. Conducts a thorough interview, writes a comprehensive PRD, has it reviewed by a second expert, and creates an AGENTS.md file.

plugins.name: improve-loop
plugins.description: Automated iterative improvement loop for any project. Reads project docs, proposes an evaluation strategy, then runs a generate-evaluate-fix loop with optional expert panel review.
